diagrams.title: FOL Syntax Construction Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows how Well-Formed Formulas are built recursively from atomic components
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how FOL formulas are syntactically constructed step-by-step

diagrams.title: Quantifier Scope Visualization
diagrams.description: Visual representation of bound vs free variables within quantified expressions
elements: Variables inside quantifier scope are bound
diagrams.purpose: Understanding variable binding and scope in complex formulas

diagrams.title: Interpretation Components
diagrams.description: Structure of an interpretation showing how each type of symbol gets meaning
elements: Function assignment If: f^n → D^n → D
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how semantics assigns meaning to syntactic symbols

diagrams.title: Truth Evaluation Flowchart for Quantified Formulas
diagrams.description: Step-by-step process for evaluating truth of quantified formulas under interpretation
elements: ∀: TRUE if all elements satisfy; FALSE if any fails
∃: TRUE if at least one satisfies; FALSE if none satisfy
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how to determine truth values of quantified statements

visuals.title: Syntax And Semantics Of First Order Logic
visuals.description: Visual diagram for syntax and semantics of first order logic
